query: heavy 35mm film grain noise texture analog photography
message: anti-aesthetic / clarity_and_focus / film_artifacts: heavy 35mm grain, noise textures, gritty analog

response.objective_caption: A dark vertical mass rises through the center of the frame, flanked by faint, shadowy shapes barely visible in a fog-filled background. The scene is rendered in shades of gray with a uniformly textured surface across the entire image.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: Heavy analog film grain blankets the entire frame, combining with intentional soft-focus blur to render a dark vertical silhouette and faint surrounding shapes in a misty, desaturated environment. The muted, washed-out gray palette and dreamlike lack of sharpness create an oppressive atmosphere of dread and unease as ghostly forms emerge from the hazy background.
